message:
chore(gitignore): add .beads/*.lock to the Beads runtime-artifacts block

Existing block covered .beads/cache/, .beads/*.log, .beads/*.sock, and
.beads/*.sock.*. Since beads_rust 3a40ad0 landed the shared write-lock
lifecycle (MCP handlers now acquire the same .beads/.write.lock and
.beads/.sync.lock files the CLI uses), any mutating `br` operation or
an MCP `br serve` session leaves these two locks on disk while it runs.

Cover with a single `.beads/*.lock` glob alongside the existing
patterns. Consistent with the new .beads/*.lock line I just added to
beads_rust, CASS, mcp_agent_mail_rust, and frankensqlite.
